title: Oil Rises as US-Iran Attacks Escalate, Bonds Fall: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着美伊袭击升级，油价上涨，债券下跌：市场结束
summary: Oil climbed to the highest level in more than a month and bonds fell as US and Iranian attacks escalated, renewing inflation concerns. Stocks steadied after a technology-led selloff rattled markets last week.

title: NZD: Hedge Funds Amass Biggest New Zealand Dollar Net Short Since 2006
title_cn: 新西兰元：对冲基金积累自 2006 年以来最大的新西兰元净空头
summary: Leveraged funds have taken their short positions on the New Zealand dollar to a record high, betting that a recent rebound in global oil prices may exacerbate domestic economic pressures.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
title_cn: 7 月 20 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Brent crude jumped after the US and Iran escalated hostilities, including the targeting of vessels attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz and an attack on a key oil facility in Kuwait over the weekend.

title: US Strikes Iran in Escalating Campaign After Troops Killed
title_cn: 美军阵亡后，美国对伊朗的打击升级
summary: The US and Iran engaged in a quickening series of tit-for-tat attacks, with the American military conducting a wave of strikes on the Islamic Republic following the deaths of service personnel.

title: Tungsten Miner’s Stock Jumps as Billionaire Forrest Buys Stake
title_cn: 亿万富翁福雷斯特购买股份，钨矿商股价上涨
summary: EQ Resources Ltd. shares surged after mining billionaire Andrew Forrest agreed to acquire a 16.8% stake in the Sydney-listed tungsten producer from Oaktree Capital Management LP.

title: Innolight Gauges Interest for $8 Billion Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: 旭创科技评估 80 亿美元香港上市的兴趣
summary: China’s Zhongji Innolight Co. is starting to gauge investor demand for its Hong Kong listing, according to terms of the deal seen by Bloomberg News, bringing it a step closer to what may be the city’s largest first-time share sale in seven years.

title: India Private Banks See Corporate Loans Rise as Bond Yields Climb
title_cn: 随着债券收益率攀升，印度私人银行看到企业贷款增加
summary: Managements sounded fairly confident that credit demand will hold up.

title: Soybeans and Corn Extend Gains as US-Iran Hostilities Escalate
title_cn: 随着美伊敌对行动升级，大豆和玉米上涨
summary: Soybeans and corn futures extended gains as crude oil jumped after hostilities in the Middle East escalated, boosting the appeal of biofuels.

title: Chinese Traders Unwind Leveraged Bets at Fastest Pace Since 2016
title_cn: 中国交易者以 2016 年以来最快的速度解除杠杆押注
summary: Chinese stock traders unwound leveraged positions at the fastest pace since the 2015–2016 market crash on Friday, as fears that the AI-driven rally had become overstretched triggered a global equities rout.

title: US, Congo Ebola Travel Restrictions May Hamper Humanitarian Aid Response
title_cn: 美国、刚果埃博拉旅行限制可能会阻碍人道主义援助响应
summary: New US and Congolese travel restrictions aimed at keeping Ebola from spreading across borders are drawing warnings from aid organizations and medical experts who say the measures could undermine efforts to control the world’s fastest-growing outbreak of the virus.

title: Gold Steadies as Traders Assess Rates Path After US-Iran Clashes
title_cn: 交易员评估美伊冲突后的利率走势，金价持稳
summary: Gold steadied after the US and Iran ramped up attacks over the weekend, as traders assess the likelihood of the Federal Reserve raising interest rates to contain inflation.

title: Venezuela’s Official Death Toll From Twin Quakes Rises to 5,208
title_cn: 委内瑞拉官方公布的两次地震死亡人数上升至 5,208 人
summary: Venezuela’s official death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck the country on June 24 rose to 5,208, according to the latest figures released on Sunday by National Assembly President Jorge Rodríguez.

title: Korea President’s Stock Dream Bumps Into Leveraged ETF Backlash
title_cn: 韩国总统的股票梦想遭遇杠杆ETF强烈反对
summary: South Korea’s most closely watched stock-market innovation is morphing into a headache for President Lee Jae Myung.

title: IDR/USD: Rupiah May Recover on Rate Hike, Stronger Fiscals, Analysts Say
title_cn: 印尼盾/美元：分析师表示，卢比可能会​​因加息和财政强劲而复苏
summary: The Indonesian rupiah is poised for a period of stability, with analysts expecting the central bank to continue supporting Asia’s worst-performing currency and foreign funds to step up purchases of the nation’s high-yielding bonds.

title: Aussie’s Slide Versus Kiwi to Slow on Rate Gap, Strategists Say
title_cn: 策略师表示，澳元兑新西兰元的下滑将缩小利率差距
summary: The Australian dollar’s steep selloff against its New Zealand counterpart is set to slow, with analysts saying Australia’s higher interest rates and a key technical support will cushion the currency.

title: Bond Traders Take Warsh at Word, See Inflation Fight Continuing
title_cn: 债券交易员相信沃什的话，认为通胀斗争仍在继续
summary: Bond traders and Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh are in agreement on a crucial point: The central bank’s fight against inflation still seems far from over.

title: Caspian Pipeline Consortium Halts Loadings on Drone Strike
title_cn: 里海管道财团因无人机袭击而停止装载
summary: Oil loading at the Caspian Pipeline Consortium’s terminal on Russia’s Black Sea coast was suspended after a drone strike, prompting the Kazakh government to call for an immediate end to such attacks.

title: Tropical Storm Watches Posted Across Florida’s Panhandle Region
title_cn: 佛罗里达州狭长地带地区发布热带风暴监测报告
summary: A tropical storm watch has been issued for the Florida Panhandle as the Atlantic’s next event takes shape off shore.

title: Extreme Stock Swings Tempt Funds Into Reverse Dispersion Trade
title_cn: 极端的股票波动吸引资金进行反向分散交易
summary: Betting that individual stocks will be volatile while the S&P 500 stays relatively calm has been a popular and successful hedge fund strategy. But with the swings in share prices reaching extreme levels, the reverse trade is gaining traction with investors.

title: Alibaba Shares Rise After Unveiling Upgraded Flagship AI Model
title_cn: 推出升级版旗舰人工智能模型后阿里巴巴股价上涨
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. shares rose as much as 5.4% on Monday after the company launched a preview version of its flagship Qwen3.8 Max model, describing it as second only to Anthropic PBC’s Fable 5.

title: AI Pioneer Kai-Fu Lee’s Startup Targets Hong Kong IPO Next Year
title_cn: 人工智能先驱李开复的初创公司计划明年在香港上市
summary: 01.ai, the Chinese AI startup founded by computer scientist Kai-Fu Lee, is pushing ahead with plans to raise funds before an initial public offering in 2027.

title: Chinese Stocks Rebound After National Team Reveals Buying
title_cn: 国家队宣布买入后中国股市反弹
summary: Chinese shares rose following last week’s rout, after two major state funds revealed fresh purchases and as regulators are set to meet with key industry participants.

title: Moutai Hikes Price of Flagship Liquor for Second Time in Months
title_cn: 茅台数月内第二次上调旗舰酒价格
summary: Kweichow Moutai Co. raised prices of its flagship Feitian Moutai spirit for the second time in several months, as China’s biggest liquor maker works to boost margins hit by sagging demand.

title: Traders Cut Taiwan Stock Leverage at Fastest Pace in 15 Months
title_cn: 交易员以 15 个月来最快的速度削减台股杠杆
summary: Taiwan’s retail investors unwound their leveraged stock bets at the fastest pace since April 2025 on Friday, helping drive the local equity market into a technical correction.

title: The Brewing Battle Between Netflix and YouTube Over Creators
title_cn: Netflix 和 YouTube 正在酝酿争夺创作者之战
summary: Netflix is doing deals with many of YouTube’s biggest stars. How will YouTube respond?

title: TSMC’s $265 Billion US Spend Driven by Demand, Rivals, CFO Says
title_cn: 首席财务官称，竞争对手需求推动台积电在美国支出 2650 亿美元
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. is adding $100 billion to its investments in Arizona to meet strong demand from US customers and to ward off ambitious rivals, a senior executive said this week.

title: Teleperformance Wants Entire BPO Staff to Be AI-Enabled by 2027
title_cn: Teleperformance 希望到 2027 年所有 BPO 员工都支持 AI
summary: French business process outsourcing company Teleperformance SE plans to embed artificial intelligence in the workflow of its entire workforce of half-a-million people, speeding up adoption of the same technology that’s driving labor market disruption for the industry.

title: Moonshot Plans IPO in Six Months After China AI Breakthrough
title_cn: 中国人工智能取得突破后，Moonshot 计划在六个月内首次公开募股
summary: Moonshot AI has told investors it’s preparing to list in as early as six months, seizing the opportunity to tap capital markets after its latest model upended industry perceptions of China’s artificial intelligence capabilities and sent tech stocks reeling.

title: Why Apple’s OpenAI Lawsuit Doesn’t Mention Jony Ive; AI Recording at Genius Bar
title_cn: 为什么苹果的 OpenAI 诉讼没有提及 Jony Ive；天才吧AI录音
summary: Also: The company tries out AI recording for Genius Bar appointments.

title: Big Tech Needs to Justify AI Spending as Investors Dump Stocks
title_cn: 随着投资者抛售股票，大型科技公司需要证明人工智能支出的合理性
summary: After last week’s wipeout in chips and the broader selloff in technology stocks, pressure is building for the biggest spenders on artificial intelligence to justify their expenditures to beleaguered traders with increasingly itchy fingers hovering over their sell buttons.

title: Modi Rivals, Students Gear Up for Parliament Protests
title_cn: 莫迪的竞争对手、学生为议会抗议做好准备
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government is set for a showdown with student protesters and opposition groups when India’s parliament reopens on Monday, as anger mounts over an education crisis and the ruling party’s legislative agenda.

title: Rubio Says Xi Still Set to Visit US After Trump Speech
title_cn: 卢比奥称习近平在特朗普演讲后仍将访美
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said President Xi Jinping’s upcoming trip to America remains on track, days after the US leader’s claims of Chinese election fraud threatened to upend the truce.

title: Putin Meets Kim Envoy After Chinese Official’s North Korea Visit
title_cn: 中国官员访问朝鲜后普京会见金特使
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin thanked North Korea for its support in the war in Ukraine during talks with Pyongyang’s top diplomat.

title: Trump Says New Air Force One Getting More Capabilities Soon
title_cn: 特朗普表示新的空军一号很快就会获得更多功能
summary: President Donald Trump said a Boeing Co. 747-8 gifted by Qatar serving as the stopgap Air Force One will be outfitted with additional security features later this year.

title: Trump Silent So Far on Iran Plans as US Death Toll Hits 17
title_cn: 美国死亡人数已达 17 人，特朗普迄今对伊朗计划保持沉默
summary: If President Donald Trump knows where he wants to take the war in Iran, he’s giving little sign of it publicly.

title: Jackson on Track to Replace Platner as Maine Senate Nominee
title_cn: 杰克逊有望取代普拉特纳成为缅因州参议院候选人
summary: Troy Jackson, a former senior state lawmaker, is on track to secure the Democratic US Senate nomination in Maine, replacing Graham Platner, a progressive favorite who was pushed out of the race amid sexual assault allegations.

title: Magyar Endorses Chess Great Judit Polgar for Hungarian President
title_cn: 马扎尔支持国际象棋大师朱迪特·波尔加竞选匈牙利总统
summary: Prime Minister Peter Magyar proposed chess legend Judit Polgar as Hungary’s next president, saying the country needs a head of state “every Hungarian can be proud of“ after the removal of Tamas Sulyok.

title: Burnham Vows Unity After Lightning Ascent to UK Premiership
title_cn: 伯纳姆在闪电般晋级英国英超后发誓团结一致
summary: Andy Burnham is set to become the UK’s seventh prime minister in just over a decade on Monday with a number of outstanding questions about who will be in his cabinet and the policy direction he will pursue.

title: Russia Hits Kyiv With Largest Ballistic Missile Barrage
title_cn: 俄罗斯以最大规模的弹道导弹袭击基辅
summary: At least one person was killed in what Ukraine’s foreign minister called the largest ballistic missile barrage aimed at Kyiv since the start of the Russia’s invasion more than four years ago.

title: Merz Sees Chance for Broader Cabinet Reshuffle After Spahn Exit
title_cn: 默茨认为斯潘退出后有机会进行更广泛的内阁改组
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the departure of the conservative bloc’s parliamentary group leader Jens Spahn has opened up the possibility of a broader government reshuffle.

title: Singapore Opposition Party’s Kenneth Jeyaretnam Dies at 67
title_cn: 新加坡反对党领袖 Kenneth Jeyaretnam 去世，享年 67 岁
summary: Kenneth Jeyaretnam, the leader of Singapore’s opposition Reform Party, has died. He was 67.

title: Hitler’s Birthplace Becomes Police Station to Keep Nazi Pilgrims Away
title_cn: 希特勒出生地变身警察局，驱赶纳粹朝圣者
summary: Austria will open a police station in the building where Adolf Hitler was born in 1889, aiming to end decades of public debate on how to prevent it from becoming a pilgrimage destination for far-right extremists.

title: Burnham to Scrap UK Digital ID to Focus on Cost of Living Policies
title_cn: 伯纳姆将废除英国数字身份证以专注于生活成本政策
summary: Andy Burnham will ditch plans for a government-issued digital ID for all British adults in a “reset of priorities” when he becomes prime minister on Monday.

title: Zelenskyy Tasks Political Novice to Get Ukraine Through Winter
title_cn: 泽伦斯基责成政治新手帮助乌克兰度过冬天
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is turning to a technocratic energy executive with no cabinet experience or political ties as his prime minister to prepare Ukraine to survive another winter of war.
